page.title: Category:Alumni of Tokushima Prefectural Jonan High School

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[徳島県立城南高等学校]]出身の人物に関するカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:とくしまけんりつしょうなんこうとうかつこう}} [...'
体裁を調整。

revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[ja:Category:徳島県立城南高等学校出身の人物]] [[ko:Category:도쿠시마현립 조난 고등학교 동문]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Kida Sadakichi]].

Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q24864926)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{CategoryTOC}} {{citation needed|とくしまけんりつしょうなん}} {{translated page|ja|Category:徳島県立城南高等学校出身の人物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:徳島県立城南高等学校出身の人物|version=90974324}} {{wikidata link|Q24864926}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:徳島県立城南高等学校出身の人物]] [[ko:Category:도쿠시마현립 조난 고등학교 동문]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Kida Sadakichi]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:High school alumni from Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Alumni_of_Tokushima_Prefectural_Jonan_High_School here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
